parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jql: 'project=SPRO AND labels=qa-auto AND summary~"' + $json.spec_file + '" AND status NOT IN (Done,Closed) AND created >= -7d', maxResults: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a QA test failure diagnosis expert for Cypress 9.7.0 tests running on LambdaTest.

TEST SUITE ARCHITECTURE:
- Three properties: starlightmusic.com (CRM=starbridge), bandazon.com, silverproentertainment.com (CRM=silverops)
- Tests: API health checks, website image checks, section display checks, search results, venue commission, contract preview, white screen checks
- Login uses OTP via AWS Lambda endpoint, with cy.session() caching
- Runs on Chrome/Windows 10 via LambdaTest cloud

FAILED TEST:
- Session: ' + $json.session_id + '
- Name: ' + $json.name + '
- Spec: ' + $json.spec_file + '
- Duration: ' + $json.duration + 's
- Browser: ' + $json.browser + ' on ' + $json.platform + '

COMMAND LOGS:
' + $json.command_logs + '

CONSOLE LOGS:
' + $json.console_logs + '

NETWORK LOGS:
' + $json.network_logs + '

TEST SOURCE CODE:
' + $json.test_source_code + '

Respond with ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no backticks):
{
  "root_cause": "brief description",
  "category": "one of: api_down|selector_changed|timeout|network_error|auth_failure|data_mismatch|flaky_test|environment|unknown",
  "severity": "one of: critical|high|medium|low",
  "diagnosis": "detailed explanation in 2-3 sentences",
  "is_test_bug": true/false,
  "is_app_bug": true/false,
  "suggested_fix": "what to change",
  "fix_code": "the corrected code snippet if is_test_bug, else empty string",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ body: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Failure recurred — Build: ' + $json.build_name + ' | Session: ' + $json.session_id + ' | Root Cause: ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause + ' | Diagnosis: ' + $json.diagnosis.diagnosis }] }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: 'SPRO' }, issuetype: { name: 'Bug' }, summary: '[QA-Auto] ' + $json.diagnosis.category + ': ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause, priority: { name: $json.diagnosis.severity === 'critical' ? 'Highest' : $json.diagnosis.severity === 'high' ? 'High' : $json.diagnosis.severity === 'medium' ? 'Medium' : 'Low' }, labels: ['qa-auto', 'cypress', 'lambdatest', $json.diagnosis.category], description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Build Info' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Build: ' + $json.build_name + ' | Session: ' + $json.session_id + ' | Spec: ' + $json.spec_file + ' | Duration: ' + $json.duration + 's | Browser: ' + $json.browser + ' / ' + $json.platform }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Root Cause' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.root_cause }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Diagnosis' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.diagnosis }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Suggested Fix' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.suggested_fix }] }, { type: 'heading', attrs: { level: 3 }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Fix Code' }] }, { type: 'codeBlock', attrs: { language: 'javascript' }, content: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.diagnosis.fix_code || 'N/A' }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Confidence: ' + ($json.diagnosis.confidence * 100).toFixed(0) + '% | Category: ' + $json.diagnosis.category + ' | Test Bug: ' + $json.diagnosis.is_test_bug + ' | App Bug: ' + $json.diagnosis.is_app_bug }] }] } } }) }}

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.repo_owner }}/{{ $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.repo_name }}/contents/{{ $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.full_spec_path }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: '[QA-Auto] Fix: ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause, content: $json.encoded_content, sha: $json.file_sha, branch: $json.branch_name }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ title: '[QA-Auto] Fix: ' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.root_cause, body: '## AI-Diagnosed Test Fix

**Spec:** ' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.spec_file + '
**Category:** ' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.category + '
**Confidence:** ' + ($('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.confidence * 100).toFixed(0) + '%

### Root Cause
' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.root_cause + '

### Diagnosis
' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.diagnosis + '

### Suggested Fix
' + $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.diagnosis.suggested_fix + '

---
_Auto-generated by QA Failure Monitor workflow_', head: $('Prepare PR Data').first().json.branch_name, base: 'main', draft: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: ($json.diagnosis.severity === 'critical' ? '🔴' : $json.diagnosis.severity === 'high' ? '🟠' : $json.diagnosis.severity === 'medium' ? '🟡' : '🟢') + ' QA Test Failure: ' + $json.diagnosis.category } }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Build:*
' + ($json.build_name || 'N/A') }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Spec:*
' + $json.spec_file }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Severity:*
' + $json.diagnosis.severity }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Confidence:*
' + ($json.diagnosis.confidence * 100).toFixed(0) + '%' }] }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Root Cause:* ' + $json.diagnosis.root_cause + '

*Diagnosis:* ' + $json.diagnosis.diagnosis } }, { type: 'actions', elements: [{ type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'View in LambdaTest' }, url: 'https://app.lambdatest.com/automation/logs/build/' + $json.build_id + '/session/' + $json.session_id }, { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Jira Ticket' }, url: 'https://starlightmusic.atlassian.net/browse/' + ($json.existing_jira_ticket || 'SPRO') }, { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Review PR' }, url: 'https://github.com/ramonthedom/LambdaCypress/pulls' }] }, { type: 'context', elements: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: 'Session: ' + $json.session_id + ' | ' + new Date().toISOString() }] }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '⚠️ QA Failure Monitor Error: ' + $json.error.message }) }}
